d_utils.config.title: D Utils - Privacy Protection
d_utils.config.protection_enabled.toolti: Prevents servers from detecting your mods by blocking translation key leaks in sign, anvil, and book screens.
d_utils.config.sign_protection.tooltip: Blocks servers from reading mod-specific translation keys sent via sign edits.
d_utils.config.anvil_protection.tooltip: Blocks servers from detecting mods via item rename translation key resolution.
d_utils.config.book_protection.tooltip: Prevents mod detection through book text translation keys.
